description: Factors.ai is a B2B account intelligence platform that unifies cross-channel intent signals, scores accounts, and optimizes LinkedIn ads to grow pipeline.
overview: Factors.ai unifies intent signals from your website, ads, CRM, and third parties to identify in-market accounts, score engagement, and sharpen LinkedIn ad campaigns.
what_is: Factors.ai is a B2B account intelligence and demand-generation platform. It pulls together buyer signals from the website, ads, CRM, and third-party sources, then uses analytics and AI to reveal account journeys and point teams at the next best action.

It is strongest when intent signals are scattered across tools and you want one view to run sharper campaigns and outreach. It identifies visitors, segments accounts, and powers ads, so teams spend less time guessing and more on pipeline that converts.

Factors.ai integrates with CRMs, ad platforms, Slack, and data tools to reinforce the GTM stack. It is not a standalone CRM or full marketing-automation system; it adds intent data and attribution on top of the tools you already run.
